<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk002.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p76 -->

<!-- header: BURGHARTING -->

<!-- header: BURGHARTING -->


[[File:Band07_chunk002_p014_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk002_p014_img002.jpg|thumb|D Glorie des hl. Vitus]]



----
//
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p77 -->
